title: Harness Contract Hardening
objective: Make the harness contracts stable enough for Codex, CLI, tests, and future UI panels to consume without scraping human text.

lanes.title: Contract audit
completion_criteria: Audit harness contracts and write a checkpoint covering contract gaps, drift, and the next lane unlocked.

lanes.title: Artifact and ref conventions
completion_criteria: Stabilize object refs, proposal refs, and canonical refs so generated work cannot silently mutate canonical harness state.

lanes.title: Event and result envelopes
completion_criteria: Standardize runtime metadata, tool lifecycle payloads, and completed, blocked, and failed result envelopes.

lanes.title: Tool schema and grants
completion_criteria: Centralize gateway tool names, validation, side effects, and grant requirements.

lanes.title: CLI JSON output
completion_criteria: Add a machine-readable CLI output mode using completed, blocked, and failed result envelopes.

lanes.title: Goal artifacts
completion_criteria: Add durable goal manifest, checkpoint index, and final-report artifact contracts.

lanes.title: Docs and final gates
completion_criteria: Update docs, run final gates, write the final report, and recommend the next goal with readiness.

final_question: Given what changed during this goal, is the next planned goal still correct?
